zh: 本章节任务正在准备中，后续新增关卡会自动出现在这里。
en: Missions for this chapter are in preparation. New levels will appear here automatically.

zh: 选 择 任 务

· 目标：操控谢尔曼完成每关任务要求。

· 每回合行动阶段由攻击/移动/杂项3个阶段组成，攻击和移动可自由选择先后顺序，每个阶段根据所在地形获得对应数量的行动骰子。

· 移动阶段：使用对应点数转向、前进、后退，两个相同骰子可以合并执行新的动作。

· 攻击阶段：主炮需要装填后才可使用，可攻击直线上未被视线阻挡的装甲单位；机枪可扫射直线上未被视线阻挡的步兵（1D6 命中检定）。

· 杂项阶段：装填、灭火、隐蔽、烟雾、副驾驶机枪等。

· 敌方回合：按距离由近到远依次行动；步兵只在回合结束事件里出没。

· 操作：点骰子弹出动作菜单；选中对应选项后执行动作。
en:
· Goal: Complete each mission's objectives with the Sherman.

· Each turn has three action phases (Attack / Move / Misc). Attack and Move may be resolved in either order; each phase grants action dice according to the terrain you occupy.

· Move phase: spend matching pips to turn, advance, or reverse; two identical dice may be merged to perform new actions.

· Attack phase: the main gun can only be used after loading; it may fire at armored targets along a straight line if line of sight is clear. The machine gun may strafe infantry along a clear straight line (roll 1d6 to hit).

· Misc phase: reload, extinguish fire, concealment, smoke, co-driver MG, and more.

· Enemy phase: enemies act from nearest to farthest; enemy infantry only appear during end-of-turn events.

· Controls: tap a die to open its action menu; pick an option to execute it.

zh: 建筑叠加：坦克可进入格内；视线沿路径经过建筑格时会被遮挡。
en: Building overlay: tanks may enter the tile; line of sight is blocked when the sight path passes through a building tile.

zh: 森林：谢尔曼与德军坦克不可进入；步兵可进入；遮挡视线。
en: Forest: Sherman and German tanks cannot enter; infantry can enter; blocks line of sight.

zh: 水域：任何单位不可进入；不遮挡视线。
en: Water: impassable to all units; does not block line of sight.

zh: 主炮射击时视线上的每个树篱使命中所需点数+1，但攻击者相邻的树篱不增加命中所需点数。
en: For main-gun fire, each hedge along the line of sight adds +1 to the hit number, but hedges adjacent to the attacker do not increase the hit number.

zh: 防波堤：日军单位移动不受影响；盟军坦克在移动阶段不能跨越，仅杂项阶段 3 点的前进动作可跨越。
en: Breakwater: Japanese units ignore it. Allied tanks cannot cross it during the Move phase; only the Misc-phase 3-pip advance may cross.

zh: 掷骰规则：各地形在移动 / 攻击 / 杂项子阶段的基础颗数见下；再叠加乘员与舱盖修正后，总颗数限制在 {capMin}～{capMax}。
en: Dice: per-terrain base counts for movement / attack / misc below; crew and hatch modifiers apply; total dice are clamped to {capMin}–{capMax}.

zh: 移动阶段：基础骰子 {n} 颗，驾驶员存活 +{md}、副驾驶存活 +{mc}、车长开舱 +{mh}。
en: Movement: base {n} dice; driver alive +{md}, co-driver alive +{mc}, commander hatch open +{mh}.

zh: 攻击阶段：基础骰子 {n} 颗，炮手存活 +{ag}、装填手存活 +{al}、车长开舱 +{ah}。
en: Attack: base {n} dice; gunner alive +{ag}, loader alive +{al}, commander hatch open +{ah}.

zh: 杂项阶段：基础骰子 {n} 颗，车长开舱 +{xc}。
en: Misc: base {n} dice; commander hatch open +{xc}.

zh: 该单位不套用装甲 / 穿甲数据表。
en: This unit has no armor / penetration stat table.
